channel.title: Admissions on Al-Qadisiyah University
channel.description: Recent content in Admissions on Al-Qadisiyah University

item.title: Admission Plans
item.description:
Admission Plans

Admission Plan 2025-2026

College Morning Evening
Medicine 200 -
Engineering 400 200
Science 350 150
Computer Science 300 150
Law 250 200
Education 500 250

Plans Archive

  • Plan 2024-2025 (PDF)
  • Plan 2023-2024 (PDF)
  • Plan 2022-2023 (PDF)

Contact

  • admission@qu.edu.iq

item.title: Admission Requirements
item.description:
Admission Requirements

General Requirements

  1. Iraqi Preparatory Certificate or equivalent
  2. Meeting required average for college and major
  3. Passing medical examination (for health colleges)
  4. No disciplinary dismissal from another university

Required Documents

  • Original graduation certificate with certified copy
  • Civil Status ID
  • National Card
  • Iraqi Nationality Certificate
  • Recent passport photos (6 photos)

Admission Averages

College Scientific Literary
Medicine 98+ -
Engineering 85+ -
Science 70+ -
Law - 75+

Averages are approximate and vary annually

item.title: International Students
item.description:
International Students - Study in Iraq

Al-Qadisiyah University welcomes international students from around the world.

Study in Iraq Program

A government program to attract international students to study at Iraqi universities.

Benefits

  • Competitive tuition fees
  • University accommodation
  • Student visa
  • Academic support

Required Documents

  • Valid passport
  • Certified academic certificates
  • Health certificate
  • Passport photos

Application Steps

  1. Register via Study in Iraq Portal
  2. Choose university and program
  3. Submit documents
  4. Receive conditional acceptance
  5. Complete visa procedures

Contact

  • Email: international@qu.edu.iq

item.title: Online Application
item.description:
Online Application

For Undergraduate Studies

Apply via the Centralized Admission Department:

Centralized Admission Department

For Postgraduate Studies

Apply via the Postgraduate Studies Portal:

Postgraduate Studies Portal

For International Students

Study in Iraq Portal

Assistance

  • Email: admission@qu.edu.iq
  • Phone: +964 780 000 0000

item.title: Postgraduate Admissions
item.description:
Postgraduate Admissions

Available Programs

  • Master’s Programs
  • Doctoral Programs
  • Higher Diploma Programs

Admission Requirements

Master’s

  • Bachelor’s degree with minimum 65% average
  • Passing admission test and interview
  • English language certificate

Doctorate

  • Master’s degree with minimum 70% average
  • Preliminary research proposal
  • Academic supervisor approval

Apply

Online Application for Postgraduate Studies

Contact

  • Email: postgraduate@qu.edu.iq

item.title: Undergraduate Admissions
item.description:
Undergraduate Admissions (Bachelor’s)

Available Colleges

The university includes 18 colleges offering bachelor’s programs in various specializations.

Admission Requirements

  • Iraqi Preparatory Certificate or equivalent
  • Meeting the required average for the college
  • Passing medical examination (for health colleges)

Application Steps

  1. Register with Centralized Admission Department
  2. Select preferences by priority
  3. Follow admission results
  4. Complete registration procedures

Learn More

  • Detailed Admission Requirements
  • Admission Plans
